name: USS Putnam (DD 757)
events: 9 Dec 1944 With her shakedown completed USS Putnam (Cdr. F.V.H. Hilles) arrived at San Diego.
30 Dec 1944 USS Putnam (Cdr. F.V.H. Hilles) departed from San Francisco bound for Pearl Harbor.
6 Jan 1945 USS Putnam (Cdr. F.V.H. Hilles) arrived at Pearl Harbor.
29 Jan 1945 USS Putnam (Cdr. F.V.H. Hilles) departed from Pearl Harbor bound for Guam through Eniwetok, Saipan and Tinian.
17 Feb 1945 USS Putnam (Cdr. F.V.H. Hilles) departed from Guam to participate in the Iwo Jima landings.
19 Feb 1945 USS Putnam (Cdr. F.V.H. Hilles) arrived in the Iwo Jima area.
23 Feb 1945 USS Putnam (Cdr. F.V.H. Hilles) departed from the Iwo Jima area bound for Guam.
12 Mar 1945 USS Putnam (Cdr. F.V.H. Hilles) departed from Guam bound for Leyte, Philippines.
17 Mar 1945 USS Putnam (Cdr. F.V.H. Hilles) arrived at Leyte.
27 Mar 1945 USS Putnam (Cdr. F.V.H. Hilles) departed from Leyte to participate in the Okinawa campaign.
1 Apr 1945 USS Putnam (Cdr. F.V.H. Hilles) arrived in the Okinawa area.
6 Apr 1945 USS Putnam (Cdr. F.V.H. Hilles) departed from the Okinawa area bound for Ulithi.
8 Apr 1945 USS Putnam (Cdr. F.V.H. Hilles) arrived at Ulithi.
16 Apr 1945 USS Putnam (Cdr. F.V.H. Hilles) arrived back in the Okinawa area.
17 Sep 1945 USS Putnam (Cdr. L. Lefelar) arrived at Tokyo Bay.
